goal: Phase 4 continuation: create css/home.css scoped to body[data-page='home'], re-skinning the homepage hero CTA, readings label, and 4-tile reading-mode grid with --mt-* tokens. Loads last so it wins ties with phase-1-home.css §10 on the same selectors.
done: Created css/home.css (5 sections, 27 --mt-* token references, zero hex literals). Sections: §1 page background (rose-leaning pastel via radial-gradient + --mt-bg-gradient base); §2 hero card surface (transparent — preserve phase-1-home flex column behavior); §3 hero CTA panel + button (radial gold glow + rose-blush gradient, --mt-shadow-glow-gold + --mt-shadow-card, --mt-plum button with --mt-shadow-glow); §4 readings label (--mt-plum-soft eyebrow); §5 reading tile grid + tiles (--mt-surface-card with --mt-shadow-panel, hover lift to --mt-gold border + --mt-shadow-glow). Linked as the LAST css link on index.html (line 85, after phase-3-redesign.css) and th/index.html (line 83). cp + cap sync ios; md5 canonical == www == ios for all three files.
affects: index.html + th/index.html — homepage hero CTA now uses the --mt-* rose+gold gradient surface with --mt-shadow-glow-gold aura; the 'Draw my card' button is plum-on-cream pill with rose glow; the 4-tile reading-mode chooser tiles get the same plum-text-on-white-card-surface treatment as Phase 4 reading.css panels, with gold-border hover lift on tile pointer-over

(2) .deck-strip — the design doc Screen 01 shows a 'Your decks · 3 mini card backs' strip but no markup or JS renders it on the homepage. Filed as future markup work below. Link order on index.html now ends: phase-2-1-logo → phase-1-home → phase-3-redesign → home.css; home.css wins source-order ties with phase-1-home §10 on the same body[data-page='home'] (0,2,1) selectors. desktop-unchanged is NOT claimed (the hero CTA + tile surfaces visually shift on desktop too).
verified: grep '<link.*\.css' index.html / th/index.html — home.css is the LAST css link on both
md5 canonical == www == ios for css/home.css, index.html, th/index.html
cap sync ios completed, no plugin errors
